title: 111. Zheng4 Shi4: This point is located 2 cun proximal to Zheng4 Zong1, i.e. 4 c
text:
proximal to Zheng4 Jin1 on the tendo calcaneus (Achilles tendon) of the posterior
aspect of the distalleg. Needle perpendicular insertion 0.5 cun to 1 cun; insert to the
tibia for best results. {Lung Branch and General Vertebral Reaction Areas}
DMG 77-09 'Leg Spine 3 Needles'
124
Lumbar Sprain/Strain (LKC)
